OPEN_LEVELER.NAME: Open PF2e Leveler
OPEN_LEVELER.HINT: Open the level planner for one selected token or your assigned character.

KEYBINDINGS.NO_ACTOR: Select one owned character token or assign a character to your user first.

UI.NO_PLAN: No plan created yet. Select a class to begin.
UI.NO_CLASS: Assign a class to your character to start planning.
UI.IMPORTING_PLAN_HINT: PF2E Leveler is loading and validating your saved planner data.
UI.LOADING_PLANNER_DATA: PF2E Leveler is loading planner data.
UI.CONFIRM_CLEAR: Are you sure you want to clear this plan? All selections will be lost.
UI.CONFIRM_CLEAR_LEVEL: Are you sure you want to clear level {level}? All selections on this level will be lost.
UI.CONFIRM_APPLY_RANGE: Apply all planned levels from {startLevel} to {endLevel}?
UI.MANUAL_SPELL_NOTE: This feat grants a focus spell — you'll need to choose which spell on your character sheet after applying.
UI.SELECT_ADOPTED_ANCESTRY: Choose the ancestry granted by this feat.
UI.CUSTOM_LEVEL_PLAN_HINT: Use this section for extra planning outside the normal class schedule. Custom picks still affect planner awareness, prerequisites, and applied level-up choices.
UI.PARTIAL_BOOST_PENDING: Partial boost: two boosts needed for +1
UI.PARTIAL_BOOST_COMPLETING: This completes a pending partial +1 boost
UI.CUSTOM_SPELL_RANK_REMINDER: This class gets a new spell rank here. Use the custom plan to note the spells you expect to need at that rank.
UI.LOCKED_FILTER_HINT: This filter is locked for this picker and cannot be changed.
UI.NAME: Name

QUICK_EQUIPMENT.TITLE: Quick Equipment Packages
QUICK_EQUIPMENT.SETTINGS_HINT: Create reusable equipment packages for character creation. Price and Bulk are calculated from the contained PF2e items.
QUICK_EQUIPMENT.NO_ITEMS: No items have been added to this package yet.
QUICK_EQUIPMENT.NO_PACKAGES: Create the first quick equipment package to begin.
QUICK_EQUIPMENT.DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete {name}? This takes effect when you save your changes.
QUICK_EQUIPMENT.NAME_REQUIRED: Every equipment package needs a name.

ITEM_PICKER.ALREADY_TAKEN: This formula has already been selected

STARTING_WEALTH.NOT_PERMANENT: Only permanent items (weapons, armor, shields, equipment) can fill this slot.
STARTING_WEALTH.LEVEL_TOO_HIGH: This item is level {item} but the slot allows up to level {max}.

FEAT_PICKER.TITLE: Select Feat
FEAT_PICKER.PREREQ_UNVERIFIED_HINT: This prerequisite could not be verified automatically. You can still select the feat unless another prerequisite is explicitly unmet.
FEAT_PICKER.PREREQ_UNMET_BLOCKED: This feat is blocked because one or more prerequisites are explicitly unmet.
FEAT_PICKER.ARCHETYPE_DEDICATION_LOCK: Complete your current dedication by taking two other feats from that archetype first
FEAT_PICKER.ARCHETYPE_UNLOCK_HINT: Selectable via dedication starting at level {level}.
FEAT_PICKER.SUBCLASS_LIMITATION_HINT: This feat is required by your selected subclass or class-archetype limitation.
FEAT_PICKER.ALREADY_TAKEN: This feat cannot be selected more than once
FEAT_PICKER.HIDE_UNMET: Hide feats with explicitly unmet prerequisites

SPELLS.ALREADY_TAKEN: This spell is already in the spellbook

CREATION.TITLE: Character Creation
CREATION.CONFIRM_BODY: Apply all selections to this character? This will add ancestry, heritage, background, class, feats, and other choices.
CREATION.HIGHER_LEVEL_REDIRECT_BODY: This higher-level character already has an ancestry and class selected. Use the level planner instead of character creation.
CREATION.BOOSTS_HINT: Choose 4 different ability scores to boost.
CREATION.BOOSTS_GUIDE_BODY: Choose the available boosts from your ancestry, background, and class, then choose four free boosts. A + raises an attribute, while a − marks an ancestry flaw. Each row shows selected/required choices.
CREATION.BOOSTS_ALTERNATE_HINT: Alternate Ancestry Boosts replace your ancestry's normal boosts and flaws with two free ancestry boosts.

WIZARD.TACTICS_HINT: Choose five starting tactics for your folio.
WIZARD.INNOVATION_DETAILS_HINT: Choose your innovation's base item and initial modification.
WIZARD.INNOVATION_BASE_FIRST: Choose the base innovation item first.
WIZARD.KINETIC_GATE_HINT: Choose whether you start with a single gate or dual gate, then select your starting impulses.
WIZARD.APPARITIONS_HINT: Choose two apparitions to attune to, then mark one of them as your primary apparition.
WIZARD.DIVINE_FONT_HINT: Choose your divine font. This determines whether you channel heal or harm spells.
WIZARD.REMINDER_PREFIX: When prompted after creation, make sure to select
WIZARD.REMINDER_TACTICS_PREFIX: When prompted after creation, make sure to select your chosen commander tactics:
WIZARD.REMINDER_IKONS_PREFIX: When prompted after creation, make sure to select your chosen ikons:
WIZARD.REMINDER_INNOVATION_PREFIX: When prompted after creation, make sure to select your inventor innovation details:
WIZARD.REMINDER_KINETIC_PREFIX: When prompted after creation, make sure to select your kinetic gate choices:

CREATION.PENDING_HINT: The PF2e system will prompt you with the following choices after your character is created:
CREATION.FEAT_GRANT_HINT: Use the feat picker to choose an option for this grant.
CREATION.SPELL_GRANT_HINT: Use the spell picker to choose a spell for this grant.
CREATION.CURRICULUM_HINT: Choose {cantrips} curriculum cantrip and {spells} 1st-rank curriculum spells.
CREATION.FOCUS_CANTRIPS_AUTO: These focus cantrips will be added automatically.
CREATION.FOCUS_SPELLS_AUTO: These focus spells will be added automatically.
CREATION.MIXED_ANCESTRY_DESCRIPTION: Choose a second ancestry to pair with your primary ancestry.
CREATION.MIXED_ANCESTRY_DESCRIPTION_FOR: Choose a second ancestry to pair with your {ancestryName} ancestry.
CREATION.INTELLIGENCE_BONUS_HINT_SINGLE: Intelligence increases your modifier at this level. Choose 1 additional trained skill and 1 additional language below.
CREATION.INTELLIGENCE_BONUS_HINT_MULTI: Intelligence increases your modifier at this level. Choose {count} additional trained skills and {count} additional languages below.

ABP.NOTE: Skill potency bonuses are applied automatically by the ABP system when you select skills in the character sheet.

REMINDERS.TITLE: Action Required
REMINDERS.HEADER: {actorName} (level {level}) has selections that need manual action:

NOTIFICATIONS.MISSING_CLASS: Character must have a class assigned
NOTIFICATIONS.DUAL_CLASS_REQUIRED: Select a second class before choosing dual class feats.

SHOW_BUTTON.NAME: Show Plan Button
SHOW_BUTTON.HINT: Show the 'Plan Levels' button on character sheets

AUTO_APPLY.NAME: Auto-Apply on Level Up
AUTO_APPLY.HINT: Automatically prompt to apply planned selections when a character levels up

ALLOW_INCOMPLETE_CREATION.NAME: Allow Incomplete Character Creation
ALLOW_INCOMPLETE_CREATION.HINT: Let players apply character creation even when not every wizard step is complete.

SHOW_PREREQUISITES.NAME: Show Prerequisites
SHOW_PREREQUISITES.HINT: Show prerequisite validation status on feats in the picker

IGNORE_FREE_ARCHETYPE_DEDICATION_LOCK.NAME: Ignore Free Archetype Dedication Lock
IGNORE_FREE_ARCHETYPE_DEDICATION_LOCK.HINT: When the Free Archetype variant is in use, allow new dedication feats in free archetype slots without requiring two other feats from the current archetype first.

ENFORCE_SUBCLASS_DEDICATION_REQUIREMENT.NAME: Enforce Subclass Dedication Requirement
ENFORCE_SUBCLASS_DEDICATION_REQUIREMENT.HINT: When enabled, subclass or class-archetype text such as 'You must select X Dedication as your 2nd-level class feat' restricts the level 2 class feat picker and validation to that dedication.

ENFORCE_PREREQUISITES.NAME: Enforce Feat Prerequisites
ENFORCE_PREREQUISITES.HINT: Block selecting feats with unmet prerequisites in planner feat pickers. When disabled, prerequisite results are still shown but selection is allowed.

ENABLE_REVIEW_REQUESTS.NAME: Enable player review requests
ENABLE_REVIEW_REQUESTS.HINT: Adds a "Request GM review" button for non-GM players in the Level Planner and Character Creation, letting them send you their build for review. Requests appear in the Player Review Requests panel. Off by default.

REQUIRE_REVIEW_APPROVAL.NAME: Require GM approval before applying
REQUIRE_REVIEW_APPROVAL.HINT: When on, non-GM players must get a review request approved (Resolved) before they can apply a level-up or finish Character Creation for a character. Approval stays valid until you Reopen or Dismiss the request. Requires the review-request workflow; the request button appears even if 'Enable player review requests' is off. Off by default.

HIDE_UNCOMMON.NAME: Hide Uncommon Feats
HIDE_UNCOMMON.HINT: Hide uncommon and rarer feats from the feat picker by default

HIDE_RARE.NAME: Hide Rare Feats
HIDE_RARE.HINT: Hide rare feats from the feat picker by default

PLAYER_RARITY.UNCOMMON_HINT: Allow non-GM users to see and select uncommon content in character creation and leveling tools.
PLAYER_RARITY.RARE_HINT: Allow non-GM users to see and select rare content in character creation and leveling tools.
PLAYER_RARITY.UNIQUE_HINT: Allow non-GM users to see and select unique content in character creation and leveling tools.

PLAYER_COMPENDIUM_ACCESS.NAME: Player Content Sources
PLAYER_COMPENDIUM_ACCESS.LABEL: Configure Player Sources
PLAYER_COMPENDIUM_ACCESS.HINT: Choose which compendium sources non-GM users can access in character creation and leveling tools.
PLAYER_COMPENDIUM_ACCESS.ENABLED_HINT: Limit non-GM users to the compendium sources selected in Player Content Sources.

FEAT_SORT.NAME: Default Feat Sort
FEAT_SORT.HINT: How to sort feats in the feat picker by default

DEFAULT_ELIGIBLE_ONLY.NAME: Default Feat Picker to Eligible Only
DEFAULT_ELIGIBLE_ONLY.HINT: Open feat pickers with the Eligible Only filter enabled by default.

STARTING_WEALTH.MODE_HINT: How starting equipment budget is determined. Items + Currency uses Table 10-10 with permanent item slots and a currency allowance. Lump Sum uses the flat gold value from Table 10-10. Custom uses a manual gold limit.

EQUIPMENT_GOLD_LIMIT.NAME: Custom Gold Limit
EQUIPMENT_GOLD_LIMIT.HINT: Gold piece budget for Custom wealth mode. Only applies when Starting Wealth Mode is set to Custom.
EQUIPMENT_GOLD_LIMIT.EXCEEDED: This item would exceed the starting equipment budget of {limit} gp.
EQUIPMENT_GOLD_LIMIT.EXCEEDED_TOOLTIP: Total cost exceeds the set gold limit.

ANCESTRAL_PARAGON.NAME: Ancestry Paragon Variant Rule
ANCESTRAL_PARAGON.HINT: Enable the Ancestry Paragon variant rule. Characters start with 2 ancestry feats and gain an additional ancestry feat at every odd level (3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15, 17, 19). This is separate from the Ancestry Paragon general feat.

DUAL_CLASS_SUPPORT.NAME: Enable Dual Class Support
DUAL_CLASS_SUPPORT.HINT: Enable PF2E Leveler's dual class planner support when the PF2E dual class variant rule is active.

ADDITIONAL_COMPENDIUMS.NAME: Additional Feat Compendiums
ADDITIONAL_COMPENDIUMS.HINT: Comma-separated list of additional compendium keys to search for feats (e.g. 'my-module.my-feats')

COMPENDIUM_MANAGER.NAME: Custom Compendium Categories
COMPENDIUM_MANAGER.LABEL: Configure Categories
COMPENDIUM_MANAGER.HINT: Choose additional compendiums to search for each PF2E content category used by the planner and character wizard.
COMPENDIUM_MANAGER.NO_PACKS: No matching compendiums found for this category.
COMPENDIUM_MANAGER.ALL_DISABLED: No custom compendiums available in this category.
COMPENDIUM_MANAGER.PACK_ASSIGNMENTS_HINT: Use this view to decide exactly which compendiums feed each PF2E content category. A single compendium can belong to multiple categories. Built-in defaults stay locked, and auto-detected matches are only a starting suggestion.
COMPENDIUM_MANAGER.APPLY_AUTO_CONFIRM_BODY: Replace the current draft pack assignments with the auto-detected category matches?
COMPENDIUM_MANAGER.INDEXING_HINT: PF2E Leveler is rebuilding feat, item, and spell indexes for the updated source selection.

CONTENT_GUIDANCE.NAME: Suggested Character Options
CONTENT_GUIDANCE.LABEL: Configure Suggestions
CONTENT_GUIDANCE.HINT: Mark character options as allowed, suggested, not recommended, exclusive, free-archetype exclusive, or disallowed for players. Suggested items appear with a star badge and sort to the top. Exclusive items limit player choices to the exclusive list for that tab. Free-archetype exclusive items limit only free archetype picks. Disallowed items can be hidden or shown as unselectable for players.
CONTENT_GUIDANCE.INTRO: Mark items as allowed, suggested, not recommended, exclusive, free-archetype exclusive, or disallowed. Suggested items get a star badge and sort to the top in pickers. Exclusive items limit player choices to the exclusive list for that tab. Free-archetype exclusive items limit only free archetype picks. Disallowed items can be hidden or shown as unselectable for non-GM users.

PLAYER_DISALLOWED_MODE.NAME: Player Disallowed Content
PLAYER_DISALLOWED_MODE.HINT: Choose whether player-disallowed options are hidden entirely or remain visible but unselectable for non-GM users.

CONTENT_GUIDANCE.DISALLOWED_SOURCE_REASON: Unavailable: its source ({source}) is disallowed by the GM
CONTENT_GUIDANCE.DISALLOWED_SHARED_HERITAGE_REASON: Unavailable: this heritage is banned across all compendium copies
CONTENT_GUIDANCE.GM_OVERRIDE_ALLOWED: Allowed because you are a GM
CONTENT_GUIDANCE.PLAYER_PREVIEW_ACTIVE: Player preview is active. GM overrides are not represented in this view.

PUBLICATION_FILTER_VISIBILITY.NAME: Disallowed sources in filters
PUBLICATION_FILTER_VISIBILITY.HINT: Controls whether sources you have marked Disallowed in Content Guidance still appear in the publication filter lists. Items from disallowed sources are filtered out regardless; this only affects the filter list itself.

RETRAINING.TITLE: Downtime Retraining
RETRAINING.NONE_PLANNED: No retraining planned for this level.
RETRAINING.NO_OWNED_FEATS: No owned feats available to retrain.
RETRAINING.NO_SKILL_INCREASES: No skill increases available to retrain.

REVIEW_REQUEST.SENT: Review request sent to the GM.
REVIEW_REQUEST.DIALOG_PROMPT: Ask the GM to review "{item}". Add an optional note (reasoning, backstory, etc.):
REVIEW_REQUEST.MENU_HINT: Review item/feat/spell requests your players have sent for approval.
REVIEW_REQUEST.INTRO: Requests your players have sent for GM review. Marking a request resolved or dismissed is informational only — nothing is auto-applied.
REVIEW_REQUEST.APPROVAL_REQUIRED: Your GM must approve a review request for this character before you can apply. Use "Request GM review" first.

PLAN_COMMENTS.TITLE: Comments
PLAN_COMMENTS.DROP_HINT: Drag an item, spell, or feat here to attach it
PLAN_COMMENTS.PASTE_HINT: …or paste an item UUID / @UUID link, then Enter
PLAN_COMMENTS.ATTACH_INVALID: Couldn't find an item for that UUID.
PLAN_COMMENTS.READ_ONLY: You can view comments but not post on this character.

SETUP.TITLE: PF2e Leveler GM Setup
SETUP.MENU_HINT: Configure PF2e Leveler, campaign content, PF2e variant rules, and diagnostics in one guided assistant.
SETUP.WELCOME_TITLE: Set up PF2e Leveler for this world
SETUP.WELCOME_BODY: This optional assistant collects the most important Leveler and PF2e campaign settings. Direct choices are saved when you finish; linked detail managers keep their own Save buttons.
SETUP.REVERSIBLE_HINT: You can reopen this assistant at any time from Module Settings.
SETUP.LANGUAGE_BODY: PF2e Leveler follows each user's Foundry core language. Changing it here updates the complete Foundry interface after a reload.
SETUP.LANGUAGE_GLOBAL_HINT: This is a user-specific Foundry setting, not a Leveler-only language switch. Compendium content still requires a matching translation module.
SETUP.CONTENT_BODY: Start with a campaign preset, then fine-tune rarities, compendium sources, recommendations, and bans.
SETUP.RULES_BODY: Leveler options and detected PF2e system variants are shown together. PF2e settings are changed in the system namespace and may require a reload.
SETUP.WORKFLOW_BODY: Choose how players submit plans, which sources they may use, and how starting equipment is prepared.
SETUP.DIAGNOSTICS_BODY: The scan reports missing compendiums, stale guidance references, broken equipment-package items, duplicate heritages, and cache state.
SETUP.DIAGNOSTICS_EMPTY: Run diagnostics to inspect this world's Leveler configuration.
SETUP.SUMMARY_BODY: Export the campaign profile for another world or finish to apply the selected settings.
SETUP.ALLOW_UNCOMMON_HINT: Players may choose uncommon options unless separately banned.
SETUP.ALLOW_RARE_HINT: Players may choose rare options unless separately banned.
SETUP.ALLOW_UNIQUE_HINT: Players may choose unique options unless separately banned.
SETUP.DISALLOWED_MODE: How banned content appears to players
SETUP.SHOW_PREREQUISITES_HINT: Display prerequisites in feat and option pickers.
SETUP.ENFORCE_PREREQUISITES_HINT: Prevent players from selecting options whose prerequisites are not met.
SETUP.RELOAD_SETTING_HINT: This Leveler option requires an interface reload.
SETUP.SYSTEM_SETTING_HINT: This changes a PF2e world setting.
SETUP.PF2E_ONLY_HINT: PF2e variant controls are available only in Pathfinder Second Edition worlds.
SETUP.REVIEW_REQUESTS_HINT: Players can send their character plans to a GM for review.
SETUP.REQUIRE_APPROVAL_HINT: A reviewed character must be approved before choices can be applied.
SETUP.RESTRICT_PACKS_HINT: Players only receive content from sources selected in Player Content Sources.
SETUP.ALLOW_INCOMPLETE_HINT: Players may apply a character even when required wizard steps are incomplete.
SETUP.PROFILE_IMPORTED: Campaign profile loaded into the setup draft. Finish to apply it.
SETUP.PROFILE_IMPORT_FAILED: Campaign profile could not be imported: {error}
SETUP.PROFILE_INVALID_JSON: The selected file is not valid JSON.
SETUP.PROFILE_INVALID_FORMAT: The selected file is not a PF2e Leveler campaign profile.
SETUP.PROFILE_UNSUPPORTED_VERSION: This campaign profile version is not supported.
SETUP.RELOAD_REQUIRED: Foundry will reload after saving so language and rule changes take effect.
SETUP.SAVE_FAILED: PF2e Leveler setup could not be saved: {error}
SETUP.CAMPAIGN_POLICY_HINT: These GM settings govern which options players can use in this world.

BALANCED.NAME: Balanced
BALANCED.HINT: Allow uncommon content while keeping rare and unique choices under GM control.

RESTRICTED.NAME: Restricted
RESTRICTED.HINT: Hide banned content and limit players to explicitly configured sources.

HOMEBREW.NAME: Homebrew-friendly
HOMEBREW.HINT: Allow uncommon and rare content with guidance instead of strict prerequisite blocking.

DIAGNOSTICS.MISSING_GUIDANCE: A content-guidance document no longer exists: {uuid}
DIAGNOSTICS.DUPLICATE_HERITAGE: Heritage slug “{slug}” exists in multiple packs: {packs}. Shared heritage rules cover these copies.
DIAGNOSTICS.REVIEW_DISABLED: Approval is required, but review requests are disabled.
DIAGNOSTICS.CACHE_STATUS: Session cache: {cached} pack(s) ready, {pending} request(s) pending.
DIAGNOSTICS.HEALTHY: No blocking configuration problems were found.
